@valerian , just in my case, the calculation would be as follows:
I have the $119 version, including shipping it's $134.
I have to pay 21% taxes on the $134, the total is now $162 (keep in mind that the recommended retail price is set to $160, so I already pay more than recommended)
DHL charges me an additional 2% of the total taxes they pay in advance for me (I can't say no to this) which is an additional $28.14 + 21% taxes over that amount = $34
That means my total is almost $200. At that price, I can get a variety of comparable smartwatches right now.

1. 開 Andorid o既 "Settings" / "設定"
2. 最頂右手邊有個搜尋放大鏡 icon
3. 搜尋 "Notification" / "通知"
4. 禁 "Notification access" / "通知存取權"
5. 禁多次 "Notification access" / "通知存取權"
6. 將 Android Wear 設為 on
7. 去返 Android Wear 個 app turn on 埋 location access
8. 完
